## Summary

Brief description of the proposed change.

## Rationale

Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the change:

- **Add field:** Name, type, description, required/optional
- **Modify field:** Current vs. proposed
- **Remove field:** Deprecation path (if any)

## Impact on Existing Consumers

- [ ] Backward compatible (new optional field)
- [ ] Backward compatible (new enum value)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires schema version bump)

## Example

If adding a field, provide an example attestation snippet:

```json

```

- Related issue(s):
- Regulation/standard (if applicable):
